overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V showing a first-person perspective swimming in a harbor. The camera approaches and moves alongside a massive aircraft carrier (USS Luxington), navigating through a narrow water channel between the ship and concrete dock walls, passing under connecting bridges and the ship's flight deck overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor water approaching aircraft carrier

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily toward the massive aircraft carrier in the open harbor water

entered.detail: massive gray aircraft carrier with flight deck and island superstructure
low industrial buildings along the dock edge
calm reflective blue water with gentle ripples

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in open harbor water with a clear view of the massive aircraft carrier ahead. The camera swims steadily forward in first-person perspective, approaching the ship with industrial dock buildings visible on the right horizon under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow water channel between carrier and dock wall

events.description: enters narrow water channel between aircraft carrier hull and concrete dock wall
passes underneath overhead pedestrian bridge connecting ship to dock

agents.ego_description: swimming through the narrow confined channel between the massive ship hull and the concrete dock wall

entered.detail: tall weathered concrete wall with metal railings on top
metal walkway bridge spanning from ship to dock above the water
small brown industrial structures on the dockside

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow water channel between the aircraft carrier's massive hull on the left and the concrete dock wall on the right. Swimming forward, the perspective passes underneath an overhead pedestrian bridge that casts shadows on the water, with small utility buildings visible on the dockside.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow channel under aircraft carrier flight deck overhang

events.description: exits bridge shadow and enters darker shadow beneath aircraft carrier flight deck overhang

agents.ego_description: continuing along the carrier hull swimming under the shadow of the flight deck overhang

entered.detail: massive overhanging edge of the aircraft carrier flight deck creating deep shadow
multiple large gray naval artillery cannons mounted on the ship's side

segments.scene_description: Swimming past the bridge, the camera continues along the carrier hull beneath the massive overhang of the flight deck, creating a shadowed environment. The ship's naval gun turrets become visible along the hull, while the concrete dock wall recedes slightly to the right as the channel continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person swimming perspective that moves from the open expanse of a harbor into the shadowed corridors of a massive aircraft carrier's hull. It begins in clear open water, gliding steadily toward the looming silhouette of the ship with industrial dock buildings lining the distant right horizon under a bright blue sky. As the camera advances, the environment tightens into a narrow water channel squeezed between the carrier's steel hull and a concrete dock wall, passing beneath a pedestrian bridge that casts a sudden shadow over the water. The scene then shifts further into darkness as the camera swims under the massive overhang of the flight deck, where the open sky disappears and naval gun turrets emerge along the ship's side.
